fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — CANCEL branch: when the user clicks Cancel on the popup, the route in src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts decorates the inbound tool_call_id with a `__cancelled` suffix (see applyToolResultDecisionSuffix). The interrupt-headless.spec.ts cancel test asserts the assistant message matches /Denied.*sales intro call|not booked/i AND asserts the 'Booked.*Sales intro call' confirmation is NOT present, so the response must NOT contain 'Booked'.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Denied — the sales intro call was cancelled and not booked. Send the pill again whenever you would like to revisit the slots.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — CANCEL branch. Same `__cancelled` suffix mechanism as the sales fixture above; covers the symmetric reject path for the alice pill so cancel works on either flavour.

response.content: Denied — the 1:1 with Alice was cancelled and not booked. Send the pill again whenever you would like to revisit the slots.
